Hey guys, in this video I'm going to talk about how you can notify an admin if something happens in your bot. Now this is a super important feature because ManChat Messenger is a conversational tool and we don't want to automate everything. It should be partially automated but at some point we want to probably hand off something to a customer service rep or a live chat agent whatever and that's where the notify admin comes in. So I'm going to share my screen with you. I'm going to dive right in. Now as you can see here in the bot settings in your ManChat dashboard under the notifications tab you can configure how you want to receive notifications when an admin is notified. So let's say you're an admin or at least you're part of the team so you are able to receive admin notifications you can set it how you want to receive through Messenger or through email. Now in this scenario I'm going to show you, let me go on here, I want to show you how you can set up the notify admin if something happens inside of your bot. In this scenario we're going to take the negative review as an example. Now let's say you're selling products, your song services, whatever and you're using Messenger to generate customer feedback whether it's for reviews or for user-generated content whatever it is and at some point you ask, you send your user a message and say hey how did you like our product? Please tap on the buttons below. Well if they say love it, awesome, perfect, you send them to another flow and in that flow you thank them again for their purchase whatever they bought and you ask them if they want to write a review and then they can write a review on any platform you want. Now if they say it's okay you might not want to send them immediately to a review flow where they can actually write a review you might want to get some more information from them and that will be that a flow where you ask them hey sorry to hear how can we improve what did you like because if it's okay we want it to be awesome. Now the other scenario would be I hate it that is when the shit potentially hits the back now that is where you want somebody on your team whether it's you your customer service rep your live chat agent whatever you want somebody to jump in ASAP to get in touch with this person to actually find out what's going on now that is where the notify admin comes into play so what you need to do is you need to create an action. We're going to create an action here and in this case we're going to choose for notify admins which you see is a pro feature another good reason to upgrade to pro we're going to click notify admins. By default it will be set

to all the people that are in your team. When you open it up you can see as you what I said it's by default set to send this message to the whole team through email and through messenger. You can get creative with this you can pull in all the custom fields all the data you want if you have if you want to share the message the person sends if you have let's say user input you can say something like where is it user message and then it will have the actual message from the user right in there now get creative with this and keep in mind that many chat messenger is a conversational tool where you want to automate a lot of things but there are multiple scenarios where you want to hand it off to a live chat agent now make sure that your live chat agent or your team your admins have all the information available to jump in quickly and to provide an awesome customer service and even better customer experience that is in my opinion what messenger is all about and the notify admin feature is definitely one of those tools that will help you get that done you got any questions about the notify admin section just drop us a message and we'll be happy to help
